{{Infobox sacred-art
| name = Sword Icon
| introduced = Uncrowned
}}

''See also: [[Sword Icon Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[The Sword]] [[Icon]] is a powerful conceptual symbol representing the [[essence]] of swordsmanship. To manifest this [[Icon]], an individual must embody the concept of the [[sword]] on a deep level rather than merely using it as a tool. While typically a pursuit that takes Archlords lifetimes to achieve, some individuals like [[Yerin Arelius]] have begun to reflect it earlier in their development. The [[Icon]] is a manifestation of authority, and while it is often associated with swords, the underlying cutting authority can be applied to various types of cutting weapons. Among the [[Sages]] of a specific generation, three individuals successfully manifested this [[Icon]]: the [[Sage of the Endless Sword]] (also known as [[Adama]]), the [[Sage of Fallen Blades]], and a third unnamed individual. While [[Heralds]] can resonate with the [[Icon]], they are often unable to perceive it clearly.}}

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Sword Icon]] is a technique or manifestation that can be touched upon in an attack.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c20">''Uncrowned'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[The Sword]] [[Icon]] is a specific type of [[Icon]] and a manifestation held by certain [[Sages]] that represents a powerful concept. As a practitioner develops a connection to this entity, it can provide guidance and advice during combat, though Archlords often spend entire lifetimes pursuing such a manifestation. [[Yerin]] works to strengthen her bond with the [[Icon]], sensing its presence when she pushes herself or when her [[Shadow]]'s influence is weakened. Following the advice of the [[Winter Sage]] to let the [[Icon]] show through her, [[Yerin]] eventually feels its presence settle around her and follows its instruction to run power through her [[sword]]. However, after receiving this guidance, she is no longer able to sense the entity.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">18</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Sword Icon]] is a manifestation held by certain [[Sages]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7">''Wintersteel'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Sword Icon]] has guided [[Yerin]] in battle.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8">''Wintersteel'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Sword Icon]] is a specific type of [[Icon]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Sword Icon]] is an entity that [[Yerin]] seeks to get closer to.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c11">''Wintersteel'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] is working on her connection to the [[Sword Icon]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c12">''Wintersteel'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] can feel the [[Sword Icon]] when she pushes herself.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17">''Wintersteel'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Winter Sage]] told [[Yerin]] to let the [[Icon]] show through her.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Sword Icon]] is something a practitioner can develop a connection to.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19">''Wintersteel'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Sword Icon]] is something a person might manifest before reaching [[Archlord]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] can sense the [[Sword Icon]] when her [[Shadow]]'s influence is weakened.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c21">''Wintersteel'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|An [[Icon]] is a symbol of a powerful concept.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c22">''Wintersteel'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Manifesting the [[Sword Icon]] is a way to win handily.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c22" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The feeling of the [[Sword Icon]] settled around [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25">''Wintersteel'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Sword Icon]] can provide advice to its user.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26">''Wintersteel'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Spirits cannot touch [[Icons]]; only living humans can.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Sword Icon]] told [[Yerin]] to run power through her [[sword]] and pull it free.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Sword Icon]] is something Archlords spend lifetimes pursuing.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] could no longer sense the [[Sword Icon]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Sword Icon]] is something [[Heralds]] are deaf to but can resonate with.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c8">''Waybound'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|A [[Sage]] can read an [[Icon]] like a book.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Sword Icon]] is a power or phenomenon that [[Yerin]] has experienced.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27">''Waybound'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] wrestled the [[Sword Icon]] down and it vanished.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The Winter Sage had been sending her out to fight with her sword, insisting that this would help her become a “symbol” of swordsmanship and thus get closer to the Sword Icon.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c11" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Sacred Arts]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
